emails.subject: citizens
emails.body: citizens Darla, Attached is the latest and greatest of my crude deal spreadsheet. Let me know if you have any questions. Call me when you get a chance and we can go over your questions about the June invoice as well as any other items we need to discuss. Thanks, Kim

emails.subject: citizens
emails.body: citizens Here is the lastest spreadsheet of deals I have done with Citizens. Please call if you have questions. Thanks, Kim

emails.subject: RE: Citizens
emails.body: RE: Citizens I don't know maybe we should talk to Ann Bike. I guess it should go in as an annuity. Would you like for me to talk to Ann? To: Ward, Kim S (Houston)

emails.subject: RE: Citizens
emails.body: Ann will be calling you today and will set this deal up for you. I am assuming this is for the June payment. Kim To: Ward, Kim S (Houston)

emails.subject: RE: Citizens
emails.body: RE: Citizens I am back in the office we are having a conference call this afternoon to iron out the last calculation questions and you will get a final spreadsheet for August and September from Mara Bronstein. I have not talked to Sarabeth as you have the only copy of the invoice that I had. Have you talked to Bryce about that invoice? What do you guys need in order to pay them? Thanks, Kim

emails.subject: RE: Citizens
emails.body: Anne Bike is supposed to ck that out. I am not the one to pay that invoice. Thanks for the update on the other. Darla

emails.subject: RE: Citizens
emails.body: Hi Kim, I am ready to invoice Citizens for September. Do you have the Griffith sheet ready yet? Thanks Darla
